subcodes.first_line: O Samandar! Upon thee be My glory! The mention of the loved ones of that land hath ever been and continueth to be before the Most Holy Court, and from the sea [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سمندر علیک بهائی لازال ذکر اولیای آن ارض در ساحت اقدس بوده و هست و از بحر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wisdom [hikmat]
